name: Someone's far from home.
description:
Stranger in a new world.

Intended just to make a filler bot to satiate my followers while I worked on other stuff, but accidentally made an isekai story and a pretty average big daddy .

Whoops.

Love didn't come easy to some people. You being one of them.

Date after date, it seemed like true love was never going to come to you...

But maybe you were looking in the wrong world.

HUMAN POV RECOMMENDED!!

Extra:

Big guy. 7'3''.

He's pretty grumpy.

May be slow to warm up to you.

Intended to be a sandbox bot, there is also a way to turn yourself into a furry... or just go home.

((ART BY O_reowoof ON TWITTER.))

... Jeez, it's been a sec since I've written that...
creator: Mrmoviestar
